title: F1 2021 Trophy Pack
description: A Minecraft resource pack featuring the official Formula 1 Grand Prix trophies from the 2021 season
body:
This pack adds 3D models of all 22 F1 trophies from the 2021 season, including 1st, 2nd, and 3rd place versions.
You can change a trophy’s appearance by renaming a gold ingot with an anvil or by using a command.
Requires OptiFine to work properly.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fba8ab2ff7272f0cb257e487bfe5df07161bc3f.jpeg)

# Grand Prix Names
(Names are not case-sensitive.)
- abu dhabi
- austria
- azerbaijan
- bahrain
- belgium
- brazil
- emilia romagna
- france
- great britain
- hungary
- italy
- japan
- mexico
- monaco
- netherlands
- portugal
- qatar
- russia
- saudi arabia
- spain
- styria
- turkey
- united states

# Command
**v1.20-1.21.4**
```
/give @s minecraft:gold_ingot[minecraft:custom_name="\"<grand prix name> gp <rank>\""]
```
Example
```
/give @s minecraft:gold_ingot[minecraft:custom_name="\"bahrain gp 1st\""]
```
**v1.15-1.19.4**
```
/give @s minecraft:gold_ingot{display:{Name:"{\"text\":\"<grand prix name> gp <rank>\"}"}}
```
Example
```
/give @s minecraft:gold_ingot{display:{Name:"{\"text\":\"bahrain gp 1st\"}"}}
```
